sequence.notes: 200-char hard limit. Check posts from last 60 days FIRST — post-reference note has 3-4x higher acceptance. Do NOT mention email, SSL, website, or technical finding in note.

One entry per Batch 5 lead searched (including PROFILE_NOT_FOUND entries). Write immediately after each search — do not batch at end of session. This is the only confirmation mechanism. Without this file, BRAIN cannot generate per-lead personalised notes and archive trigger cannot confirm exceptions.
